value_chain_position: Industrial software and IoT platform layer — sells PLM, CAD (Creo), and industrial IoT (ThingWorx) software that orchestrates the full product lifecycle and real-time factory floor data, directly enabling connected factory and robotics deployments.
relative_comps: PTC is the clearest software toll-taker in industrial automation: ThingWorx/Vuforia power the connected factory layer that every robot deployment needs for monitoring and digital twin management. Its 28% YoY growth reflects the Servicemax/Arena acquisitions and IoT platform ramp; 31% FCF margin is strong for an industrial software mix. It competes with Siemens Digital Industries and Dassault in PLM but has a differentiated edge in AR-assisted maintenance. The robotics_automation theme fit is genuine, not FMP filter noise.
